name: GLOBAL LEADERS CORP
summary: PART I CORPORATE HISTORY We are a company with a focus on start-up advisory and corporate consulting services, targeting start-up companies and young entrepreneurs in the Asia-Pacific Region. Global Leaders Corporation, a Nevada corporation (the Company), was incorporated in the State of Nevada on July 20, 2020. On August 25, 2020, the Company acquired 100% of the equity interests of Global Leaders Corporation, an Anguilla company (GLC Anguilla). On August 25, 2020, GLC Anguilla acquired 100% of...
